---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the workbench
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What is hard, unclear, or missing today?

## Proposed improvement

Describe the change you want.

## Why it matters

Explain the operator, contributor, or agent workflow benefit.

## Scope notes

Call out whether this is:

- Docker/runtime
- graph and structure review
- execution state
- agent workflows
- docs and contributor experience
- tests and maintenance
